name: Apple Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Baking soda, dissolved in 2/3 cup water
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine and sugar until smooth.
2. Gradually add dry ingredients (flour mixtures) to the creamed mixture, alternating with water, until combined.
3. Stir in the chopped apple.
4. Sprinkle raisins and nuts with a small amount of flour, then fold into the batter.
5. Gently fold in the egg whites until just incorporated.
6. Pour the batter into an 8-inch square nonstick pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 30 to 40 minutes or until firm.
